description_long: This is a colorful stuffed toy designed to resemble a whimsical dragon. Its body is primarily green with blue and yellow gradients, accented by a row of bright red spikes running from the top of its head down its back and tail. The dragon features two orange and yellow striped horns, large expressive eyes, and a wide open mouth with visible white teeth. Its wings are orange with yellow membranes and green edges, adding to its playful and fantasy-inspired appearance. The legs and feet are rounded and plush, with brown and yellow coloring on the feet. The overall texture appears soft and cuddly, making it suitable for children or as a decorative plush in an urban setting.
description: A vibrant, plush dragon toy with green, blue, and yellow body, red spikes, orange wings, and striped horns. It has a soft, cuddly texture and a playful fantasy design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dragon's green and blue body, orange wings, red back spikes, and open mouth with visible teeth.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dragon's wide open mouth, both striped horns, and outstretched wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the dragon's other profile, orange wing, and the curve of its tail.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the full line of red spikes along the back and tail, both wings, and the back of the head and horns.
attribute_facial_expression: The dragon has a wide open mouth with visible white teeth, giving it an expressive and slightly fierce or playful look. Its eyes are large and round, with a focused gaze and slightly raised brows.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with wings partially extended and mouth open, as if in mid-roar or play.
